title: Does anyone else think Final isnt really the Final
display_title: Does anyone else think Final isnt really the Final
wikitext:
[]: [SPOILERS]Does anyone else think Final isnt really the Final             Quote Post by UBERGEEKZILLA » Fri Jan 18, 2013 5:45 pm after all the money they have made and all the crazy things he has done in the past i think anno might have another trick up his sleeve. maybe after 4.0 theres going to be a new series. what if the redo symbol means at the very end its all redone and they make a tv series that continues it ( and is basically the original series but with alternate things happening) anyone else think this might happen.

[]:             Quote Post by Merior » Fri Jan 18, 2013 7:10 pm Agh... Don't mix the tv series with the movies. The series was a character study more than anything else, the movies are a lot more focused on plot/action. I don't really see one being the continuation of the other as something likely. What i think might happen is either a tv series depicting events between 2.0 and 3.0 or the final movie getting split in 2 parts, or both actually.

[]:             Quote Post by Stan » Fri Jan 18, 2013 10:10 pm a 5.0 or 4.0-1 and 4.0-2 would be nice

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Fri Jan 18, 2013 10:38 pm I don't know, does Anno really want to be doing Evangelion for the rest of his life? Now here's the thing. Evangelion is a cash cow franchise. Even if Final is the last thing Anno does with it, will it be the end of evangelion? I'm not sure who actually owns the rights to the property. Yeah Khara are the ones making Rebuild, but do they actually own the rights, or is it bieng lent bout by Gainex? After all Legendary pictures made the Nolan Batman movies, but Time Warner is the company that owns the charecter, so even if Legendary never touches it again there will be more Batman movies. Eva is at this point a cash cow franchise. So Final might not be the end of eva even if Anno never touches it again.

[]:             Quote Post by Stan » Fri Jan 18, 2013 10:48 pm Darkwing wrote: I don't know, does Anno really want to be doing Evangelion for the rest of his life? Now here's the thing. Evangelion is a cash cow franchise. Even if Final is the last thing Anno does with it, will it be the end of evangelion? I'm not sure who actually owns the rights to the property. Yeah Khara are the ones making Rebuild, but do they actually own the rights, or is it bieng lent bout by Gainex? After all Legendary pictures made the Nolan Batman movies, but Time Warner is the company that owns the charecter, so even if Legendary never touches it again there will be more Batman movies. Eva is at this point a cash cow franchise. So Final might not be the end of eva even if Anno never touches it again.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Fri Jan 18, 2013 10:51 pm Stan wrote: I don't see them trying to make eva related media without Anno and his input or involvement--unless they harass him and persuade him eventually.

[]:             Quote Post by UBERGEEKZILLA » Fri Jan 18, 2013 11:21 pm Darkwing wrote: I don't know, does Anno really want to be doing Evangelion for the rest of his life?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jan 18, 2013 11:27 pm UBERGEEKZILLA wrote: Lol...what else is he going to do

[]:             Quote Post by UBERGEEKZILLA » Fri Jan 18, 2013 11:35 pm Ornette wrote: Go back to making artsy live action films, work on producing films like "Kantoku Shikkaku", do special effects for Ghibli, you know, all the stuff he's been doing other than Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Lance of LoL » Fri Jan 18, 2013 11:56 pm CJD wrote: Wait, what? There are numerous Evangelion alternate universes that I'm relatively sure Anno was uninvolved in. Someone correct me if I'm wrong but I don't think he worked on Anima, Girlfriend of Steel, or the Raising Projects, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sat Jan 19, 2013 12:12 am Anno is going to be done with Evangelion after Final. Anything else that happens after that is shit I'm not interested in.

[]:             Quote Post by Blue Monday » Sat Jan 19, 2013 6:14 am ^ Absolutely - The man can finally move on and work on the numerous other things Ornette pointed out. But that's also not to say the endless push of merchandise and other Eva related crap will stop. It won't. Ever.

[]:             Quote Post by CJD » Sat Jan 19, 2013 6:28 am Blue Monday wrote: It won't. Ever.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sat Jan 19, 2013 7:00 am Anno probably isn't going to make anymore Evangelion stuff. Unless, as I proposed in the timeskip thread, he chooses not to explain the timeskip in 4.0, and instead tries to force all the timeskip material onto us in the form of another film or TV series.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Jan 19, 2013 7:18 am UBERGEEKZILLA wrote: Lol...what else is he going to do

[]:             Quote Post by Darkwing » Sat Jan 19, 2013 8:26 am UBERGEEKZILLA wrote: but lets face it...Evangelion is his main thing....evangelion is like japans star wars and he is japans george lucas

[]:             Quote Post by UBERGEEKZILLA » Sat Jan 19, 2013 12:40 pm Mr. Tines wrote: Ultraman vs the God Warriors. So he can sell more action figures

[]: not at all             Quote Post by unit01 » Sat Jan 19, 2013 11:19 pm what i've seen in Japan so far with eva is that it's not going to be slowing down anytime soon !

[]:             Quote Post by The Killer of Heroes » Sun Jan 20, 2013 12:03 am OBVIOUSLY Anno will next do Rebuild of GunBuster . :P Well, I guess Rebuild of Eva already is that in some ways lol.

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sun Jan 20, 2013 12:36 am I just hope he's already in the early stages of planning what he's gonna do next. Because with all the capital gained for Khara from Rebuild, he can pretty much do whatever the fuck he wants, animation-wise. But primarily, I hope he has at least one more great directorial effort in him that doesn't have anything to do with Evangelion.
